info.title: TVMaze API
info.description: TVMaze is a community-driven TV show and episode information API. It provides comprehensive data on TV shows, episodes, cast, crew, schedules, and people. Free tier available with rate limiting (20 calls per 10 seconds per IP). CORS enabled for cross-origin requests.

get.description: Search through all the shows in the database by the show's name. Uses fuzzy matching for flexible results.

200.description: Array of search results with score and show data

get.description: Search for a single show by name. Returns exactly one result or a 404. Less forgiving of typos than the regular search.
Look up a show by its TheTVDB, TVRage, or IMDB ID.

200.description: Show object matching the external ID

get.description: Search through all the people in the database.
Complete list of episodes that air in a given country on a given date. Defaults to the current date and US.

200.description: Array of episodes airing on the given date

get.description: Episodes from web/streaming channels for a given date.

parameters.name: country
parameters.description: ISO 3166-1 country code (optional for web schedule)

get.description: List of all future episodes known to TVmaze. Results are cached for 24 hours.
Retrieve primary information for a given show.

parameters.name: embed
parameters.description: Embed additional resources (e.g., episodes, cast, previousepisode, nextepisode)

get.description: Complete list of episodes for a show, in airing order.

parameters.name: specials
parameters.description: Set to 1 to include special episodes

get.summary: Get episode by season and number
get.description: Retrieve a specific episode by its season and episode number.
All episodes for a show that aired on a specific date.
All seasons for a show, in ascending order.
Main cast for a show, ordered by importance.
Main crew for a show, including crew types.
All aliases (AKAs) for a show, by country.
All images for a show including posters, banners, backgrounds, and typography.
Alternative episode orderings for a show (e.g., DVD order).
List all shows in the database, paginated with 250 results per page. Cached for 24 hours.

200.description: Array of shows (up to 250 per page)

get.description: All episodes within a specific season.

200.description: Array of episodes in the season

get.description: Primary information for a given episode.
All guest cast appearing in an episode.
All guest crew for an episode.
Primary information for a given person.
Show-level cast credits for a person.
Show-level crew credits for a person.
Episode-level guest cast credits for a person.
List all people in the database, paginated with up to 1000 results per page. Cached for 24 hours.

200.description: Array of people (up to 1000 per page)

get.description: All shows and their last update timestamps.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Only show updates since this period

200.description: Object mapping show IDs to unix timestamps

get.description: All people and their last update timestamps.

parameters.name: since
parameters.description: Only show updates since this period

200.description: Object mapping person IDs to unix timestamps

get.description: Information about an alternate episode list.
Episodes in an alternate list ordering.

status.description: Show status (e.g., Running, Ended, To Be Determined)

ScheduleEpisode.description: An episode with embedded show information for schedule listings

tags.name: Shows
tags.description: Show information, episodes, seasons, cast, and crew
